svg.title: Estimated productivity gains from generative AI by task
svg.desc: Estimated productivity gains from generative AI by task. Source: OECD review of experimental studies on generative AI and productivity. Experimental settings, mostly outside India; actual gains depend on task, tool, and user skill.

text.style: font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Estimated productivity gains from generative AI by task

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: OECD review of experimental studies on generative AI and productivity — Experimental settings, mostly outside India; actual gains depend on task, tool, and user skill.
